cases.prompt: Vertex AI 인증이랑 ADC 설정 좀 도와줘, gcloud 자동 설정해줘

assertions.text: It diagnoses the gcloud authentication status, checking for an active account and ADC presence.
It injects the GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT and GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS environment variables into the current session.
It provides the browser OAuth one-liner (gcloud auth application-default login) when ADC is missing.

cases.prompt: Run /gcloud-helper, my BigQuery auth seems broken and the project might be wrong

assertions.text: It detects a ghost project that is set in config but does not exist and auto-fixes it by falling back to a valid user project.
It checks the active account via gcloud auth list as part of the diagnosis.
It sets environment variables only for the current session rather than persisting them, for security.
